view.params:
SELECT dpgl.SID,dpgl.dpmc
FROM dpgl
WHERE  (:c_depart like "%"+ dpgl.sys_path +"%") or (dpgl.sys_owner=:c_user)
ORDER BY dpgl.SID ASC

SELECT hbdm.hbdm,hbdm.SID
FROM hbdm
ORDER BY hbdm.SID ASC

SELECT mdck.ckmc,mdck.SID
FROM mdck
ORDER BY mdck.SID ASC

SELECT cyka.ywmc
FROM cyka
ORDER BY cyka.SID ASC

SELECT mdka.mdka
FROM mdka
ORDER BY mdka.mdka ASC

SELECT jhdd.jhdd,jhdd.SID
FROM jhdd
ORDER BY jhdd.SID ASC

SELECT ywrybiao.SID,ywrybiao.yhm
FROM ywrybiao
WHERE   ((ywrybiao.zw like "%"+ "外销"  +"%") or (ywrybiao.zw like "%"+ "业务"  +"%")) and (ywrybiao.zt<>"离职")
ORDER BY ywrybiao.SID ASC

SELECT ywrybiao.ryxm,ywrybiao.SID
FROM ywrybiao
ORDER BY ywrybiao.SID ASC

SELECT ywrybiao.SID,ywrybiao.yhm
FROM ywrybiao
WHERE (ywrybiao.zw like "%采购%") or (ywrybiao.zw like "%外销%")
ORDER BY ywrybiao.yhm ASC

SELECT qydd.ywmc,qydd.SID
FROM qydd
ORDER BY qydd.SID ASC

SELECT bzhfsh.zhwbzh,bzhfsh.SID
FROM bzhfsh
ORDER BY bzhfsh.SID ASC

SELECT yhzl.SID,yhzl.zwmc
FROM yhzl
ORDER BY yhzl.SID ASC

SELECT cymx.fphm,cymx.SID
FROM cymx
WHERE   ((:qxjb1=2) OR ((:qxjb1 =0) AND (cymx.sys_owner=:c_user)) OR ((:qxjb1 =1) AND (cymx.sys_path like :c_depart)))
ORDER BY cymx.SID ASC

SELECT khttxx.SID,khttxx.ttdm
FROM kh,khttxx
WHERE   (kh.SID=khttxx.PID)
   AND  (kh.company_name=:company_name)
ORDER BY khttxx.SID ASC

SELECT khttxx.SID,khttxx.ttdm
FROM kh,khttxx
WHERE   (kh.SID=khttxx.PID)
   AND  (kh.company_name=:company_name)
ORDER BY khttxx.SID ASC

SELECT hbdm.SID,hbdm.hhl
FROM hbdm

ORDER BY hbdm.SID ASC
